summary: The "Elka" anti-drone system achieved a kinetic interception of a Ukrainian "Darts" fixed-wing UAV, triggering its onboard charge. The 412th Nemesis Brigade's "G-Day" operation destroyed over 130 motor vehicles and dozens of motorcycles near Huliaipole in January-February 2026. A Russian Ka-52 helicopter was reportedly downed by a 59th Brigade FPV drone near Pokrovsk, with additional footage showing a Ka-52 downed near Nadiivka and crew eliminated during evacuation. The "Rubikon" Center conducted operations across Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman, eliminating 83 Ukrainian targets including UAVs and control points. Ukrainian Navy FPV drones sank an enemy boat near Tendrivska Spit, while Iranian-backed militias used fiber-optic FPV drones to attack US Victory Base in Iraq. Ukrainian FPV pilots are experimenting with tactics like throwing riders off horses before strikes, and a Russian soldier was recorded charging an FPV drone with a bayonet and losing. An airstrike targeted a Ukrainian drone launch point and air defense system in Krasnoyarskoye, DNR.
